positive: A minimalist, symmetrical depiction of interconnected floral geometric patterns forming an organic mandala. The primary subject is a cluster of stylized lavender and sage green flowers woven into a repeating arabesque motif, outlined with clean, black linework. The background should be pure white with subtle texture. Style: Japanese woodblock print meets mid-century modern illustration. Composition: Highly centralized and balanced, suitable for a repeat textile pattern. Lighting: Flat, even, and highly defined. Color palette: Limited to pale lavender, dusty sage green, deep forest green accents, and stark black outlines. Vector art feel, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, out of focus, artifacts, messy, noisy, low detail, text, watermark, signature, debris, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, photorealism
